channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: All Languages Localization Pack - Mon Mar 16 08:47:18 UTC 2026
item.description:
Adds German, Traditional Chinese, French, Portuguese, Spanish, Russian, and Polish language packs to IntelliJ IDEs. Supported Locales German - Deutsch Traditional...
vendor: Code downloads: 1 pricingModel: PAID xmlId: com.ai.dev.tools.languagePack.mu

item.title: icns - Mon Mar 02 09:43:08 UTC 2026
item.description:
View and generate .icns macOS icons directly in your IDE. Features ICNS Viewer — opens .icns files in a built-in image viewer, displaying all embedded icon sizes...
vendor: Alexander Khmelov downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.akhmelev.icns

item.title: Kotlin Toolbox - Sun Mar 15 11:43:33 UTC 2026
item.description:
Kotlin Toolbox is an IntelliJ plugin that provides a comprehensive set of tools to enhance your Kotlin development experience.
vendor: André Monteiro downloads: 12 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.andrelmv.kotbox

item.title: OpenCode - Sat Mar 14 06:13:06 UTC 2026
item.description:
OpenCode AI coding agent inside your JetBrains IDE. Supports context from active file, cursor position, open tabs, and manual code selection.
vendor: Parth Patel (OpenCode Fork) downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: ai.opencode.plugin

item.title: OpenCode Connector - Sat Mar 14 12:13:53 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Opencode Connector downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.epochbyte.opencode-connector

item.title: Context Keeper - Fri Mar 13 20:39:51 UTC 2026

vendor: Evgeny Efimenko downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: io.github.zhefimenko.contextkeeper.plugin

item.title: gitee-vcs - Sat Mar 14 00:04:34 UTC 2026
